name: account-enrichment
description: Enrich account data with additional information when created or updated

segmentValue.description: Account segment to assign (e.g., Enterprise, SMB)

elements.instruction: Add a decision called Check_Industry with rule Is_Target_Industry if Industry equals {{industryMapping}} then Set_Segment, otherwise End
Add a decision called Check_Revenue with rule Above_Threshold if AnnualRevenue is greater than {{revenueThreshold}} then Set_Enterprise, otherwise Set_SMB
Add a record update called Set_Enterprise to update the triggering record, setting Account_Segment__c to Enterprise
Add a record update called Set_SMB to update the triggering record, setting Account_Segment__c to SMB
